_meta.description: Inline help strings keyed by data-help-id. Loaded once on app boot. Update in same commit as any UI label change.

taxonomy.title: Taxonomy
taxonomy.body: Tags and levels assigned to each puzzle. Levels come from config/puzzle-levels.json (9-band system, novice→expert). Tags come from config/tags.json. Both are written into published SGF as YG[level] and YT[tag1,tag2]. Renaming or merging them after publish breaks downstream content_hash invariants — use Edit taxonomy mode only when you understand the impact.

taxonomy-edit.title: Edit taxonomy mode
taxonomy-edit.body: Reveals rename and merge actions. These operations rewrite published SGF files and invalidate cached content hashes — never use casually. Mode auto-disables after 5 minutes of inactivity.

tag-usage.title: Usage count
tag-usage.body: How many published puzzles carry this tag. Computed from yengo-search.db (puzzle_tags table). Updates after each successful publish stage.

level-rank.title: Rank band
level-rank.body: Kyu/dan range covered by this level. Authoritative source: config/puzzle-levels.json. Levels are derived during the analyze stage by the classifier; classifier output cannot exceed the configured level set.

adapter.title: Adapter
adapter.body: One adapter = one row in config/sources.json. Exactly one is active at a time. Run targets the active adapter unless --source-override is passed. Switch with enable-adapter (Operations) or per-row Run.

adapter-counts.title: Ingested / skipped / failed
adapter-counts.body: ingested = puzzles successfully parsed and validated this pass. skipped = published puzzles whose content hash matched an existing entry. failed = puzzles that errored during ingest (parse, validation, or fetch). Numbers reflect the per-source .yengo-ingest.sqlite, not the published collection — if files were deleted manually, use Reset DB to clear stale counts.

adapter-validate.title: Adapter validation
adapter-validate.body: Runs adapter-config validate-all. Checks each source: schema fields present and well-typed, config.path exists on disk, adapter kind is registered. Does not run the adapter or read SGFs.

adapter-import-folder.title: Import existing folder
adapter-import-folder.body: Scans an existing folder of SGF subdirectories and slugifies each into a sources.json entry. Use when SGFs already live on disk and just need to be wired up. Does not generate Python code.

adapter-scaffold.title: Create adapter from template
adapter-scaffold.body: Generates a new Python adapter package under backend/puzzle_manager/adapters/{id}/ and appends a sources.json entry. Use when the source needs custom parsing logic. For a plain folder of SGFs, prefer Import existing folder.

fresh-flag.title: --fresh
fresh-flag.body: Wipes this source's .yengo-ingest.sqlite and .pm-runtime/state. Forces a full re-ingest of every file. Destructive: ingest history and failure samples are lost.

hints.title: Hints (YH)
hints.body: Up to three hints per puzzle, pipe-delimited. Generated during the analyze stage. Use {!xy} coordinate tokens (e.g. {!cg}) so the renderer can substitute board positions.

puzzle-search.title: Universal search (⌘K)
puzzle-search.body: Open with ⌘K or /. Searches sources, tags, levels, and puzzle hashes (16-hex prefix or YENGO-{hash}). Hash matches open the puzzle detail page; everything else navigates to the relevant view.
